patch.insert_text: - Influenza vaccine (split virus, trivalent, PF) administered today.
added_claims: Influenza vaccine (split virus, trivalent, PF) was administered today.

reasons: FHIR Immunization confirms flu vaccine (CVX 140, split virus trivalent PF) status completed on encounter date
Not previously mentioned in note; only Td booster documented
Vaccine administration correctly belongs in Assessment and Plan under preventive care

patch.insert_text: - Influenza vaccine (split virus, trivalent, PF) administered in left arm.
added_claims: Influenza vaccine (split virus, trivalent, PF) was administered in the left arm

reasons: The vaccine administration is supported (Immunization status 'completed', CVX 140 'Influenza, split virus, trivalent, PF'), but the claim 'administered in the left arm' is unsupported — the FHIR resource contains no site/body-location data and the transcript only says 'due for a flu shot'.
No existing mention of influenza vaccine in the note, so not redundant.
Administered vaccine belongs in Assessment and Plan, consistent with the Td booster entry.
